hook_question: 5 PLANES VANISHED. IN CLEAR WEATHER. TOGETHER.
vo_text: December 5th, 1945. Fort Lauderdale, Florida. Five Navy Avenger bombers climb into a clear afternoon sky on a routine training flight. Two hours out, the flight leader radios that both his compasses have failed. Then: everything looks wrong, we can't find the base. The sea is calm. Visibility is perfect. A rescue seaplane with thirteen men aboard takes off to find them. It never radios back. Six aircraft. Twenty-seven men. Not one wreck, not one body, not one drop of oil was ever recovered. The Navy closed the file with two words: cause unknown. Flight 19 vanished together, in clear weather, and the ocean has never given any of it back.

assets_used.role: mid-video + thumbnail base — 5-plane formation over coastline
outro — lone Avenger over open ocean
